title: Sluis Van Central space station

When the technologically-advanced [[Sluissi]] [[Species/Legends|species]] joined the infantile [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], they established several major [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] throughout the [[Sluis sector/Legends|Sluis sector]]. Once such [[Space station/Legends|space station]] was the high-tech '''Sluis Van Central space station'''. The station, also referred to as the '''Sluis Van space facility''', performed duties similar to others operated by the Sluissi. It catered to [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] seeking maintenance to prepare for, or recover from, their various activities.<ref name="TTS" />

==History==
[[File:Sluis_Van_Central_space_station.jpg|thumb|right|180px|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Niles Ferrier]] in the station shortly after the [[Battle of Sluis Van]].]]

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], following [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Battle of Sluis Van|raid]] of the [[Sluis Van Shipyards]] that was repelled by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|forces]], the massive station was overwhelmed by repair orders. Sluissi defense craft were given top priority over the Republic fleet and civilian vessels, much to the chagrin of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who was in need of new [[Hyperdrive motivator/Legends|Hyperdrive motivators]] for his [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] so he could fly to Coruscant and prevent the political expulsion of [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]]. Enlisting the help of his friend, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], Skywalker tried to diplomatically have his priority raised, though Antilles's efforts were rebuffed by a data pusher in the system.

==Behind the scenes==
The Sluis Van Central space station appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s [[1992]] novel entitled ''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' and was later mentioned in the ''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'', an adaptation of that book to the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|roleplaying game]]. The section detailing the Sluissi species, which referenced the facility, was later collected in ''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'', a summary of the sourcebooks made for each novel in Zahn's [[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy|trilogy]].
